approval.description: Human answer gate decision for the research questions step.
approval.x-usage: Use approved when user answers are ready for research_answered_draft, and blocked only when blocker explains why research must pause.

answers.description: Optional structured user answers captured by the approval gate.
answers.x-usage: Use as the authoritative user answers when present.

results.description: Optional compact summary of approved user answers.
results.x-usage: Use as supporting answer context; do not route from this field.

blocker.x-usage: Surface this blocker before continuing; do not infer missing blocker details from prose.
